title: The Representation of the People Act, 1950
full_text: The Representation of the People Act, 1950 लोकप्रतिनिधित्वअधिनियम, 1950 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195043 Act Number: 43 Enactment Date: 1950-05-12 Act Year: 1950 Short Title: The Representation of the People Act, 1950 Hindi Title: लोकप्रतिनिधित्वअधिनियम, 1950 Long Title: An Act to provide the allocation of seats in, and the delimitation of constituencies for the purpose of election to, the House of the People and the Legislatures of States, the qualifications of voters at such elections, the preparation of electoral rolls, the manner of filling seats in the Council of States to be filled by representatives of Union territories, and matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 12-05-1950 Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 3. THE THIRD SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 4. THE FOURTH SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 5. THE FIFTH SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 6. THE SIXTH SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 7. THE SEVENTH SCHEDULE. Chief Electoral Officers, District Election Officers, etc., deemed to be on deputation to Election Commission. Section 13D. Electoral rolls for Parliamentary constituencies. Section 14. Definitions Section 15. Electoral roll for every constituency. Section 16. Disqualifications for registration in an electoral roll. Section 17. No person to be registered in more than one constituency. Section 18. No person to be registered more than once in any constituency. Section 19. Conditions of registration Section 20. Meaning of “ordinarily resident” Show Related Subordinates Section 20A. Special provisions for citizens of India residing outside India. Section 21. Preparation and revision of electoral rolls. Constitution of electoral colleges for the filling of seats in the Council of States allotted to Union territories. Section 27B. Omitted. Section 27C. Omitted. Section 27D. Omitted. Section 27E. Omitted. Section 27F. Omitted. Section 27G. Termination of membership of electoral college for certain disqualifications. Section 27H. Section 27K. Omitted. Section 28. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 29. Staff of local authorities to be made available. Section 30. Jurisdiction of civil courts barred.
